The hidden geometric/contact criterion (likely a small cook_region named region or a contact-pair predicate against a stove site that the swap-randomized pot bases do not register) is unreachable via the allowed primitives (move_to / move_pose / rotate_pitch / pi0_pick / pi0_doubled / release / set_gripper).
